nodes.summary: Outdoor — 63 products grouped under the outdoor category.

content.text:
# Outdoor

Subtree fanout for the outdoor category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 63 product children — agents looking for outdoor can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.
